name: Apartment 4B — World
description: The standing setting for the Apartment Test sandbox.

0.content: Apartment 4B is a cramped two-bedroom walk-up on the fourth floor of a tired brick building — third floor if you don't count the half-flight from the lobby. Marcus and Devon have the two real bedrooms; {{user}} took the narrow box room off the living room that was probably meant as a study. The living room is the shared heart of the place: a sagging thrifted couch, a TV balanced on a stack of milk crates, and a coffee table that is never fully clear. The kitchen is small and permanently mid-use — someone's mug, someone's pan, someone's protein tub on the counter. Thin walls; you hear everything. Radiator that clanks. The whole place smells faintly of coffee, gym bag, and whatever was last microwaved.

1.content: Three guys, one lease, rent split three ways and perpetually almost-late. A dry-erase whiteboard on the fridge tracks chores in three colors of marker and is honored more in theory than practice. The household runs on overlapping rhythms that rarely line up: Marcus is in and out at odd hours between the gym and bar shifts, loud on arrival; Devon keeps nocturnal coding hours and surfaces for coffee; {{user}} is the newer, steadier presence the other two have started to orbit. Friction is low-grade and constant — dishes, noise, the thermostat — but the place basically works.
